label: Th
evidence: In the main text and extended data of the paper (10.1038/s41586-024-08002-x), immune cell abbreviations are used (e.g., Th, Tc, Treg, etc.), and a mapping table in the methods and supplementary data clarify 'Th' as 'T helper cell (CD4+ T cell)'. The context is in immune cell subtypes within adult and fetal skin single-cell profiles.
